pageContext.name: Boba Fett’s Starship
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are proud to present the Boba Fett's Starship 1:144 Scale Model Kit!  The highly detailed model kit comes with a Cloud City style display base, laser blast effect parts, two figures of Boba Fett (sitting and standing), a Han Solo in carbonite, parts for displaying the craft with its hatch open, and wing flap parts. Features a movable cockpit and wings. This is a color-molded snap-fit model kit.  Be sure to add this Model Kit to your Star Wars collection!
